headline: Assessing Teradyne (TER) Valuation After A Sharp Multi‑Month Share Price Rally
summary: Teradyne (TER) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the stock with a one-month return of about a 5% decline and a gain of roughly 58% over the past three months, prompting closer scrutiny of its valuation. See our latest analysis for Teradyne. Zooming out, the recent 4.6% one month share price pullback sits against a much stronger backdrop, with a 57.6% 90 day share price return and a very large 240.3% one year total shareholder return suggesting momentum has been strong rather...
